name: bbbba
description: Universal WHATWG Fetch API for Node, Browsers and React Native

scripts.build: npx turbo run build --dry-run=json > /tmp/dry.json; npx turbo run build -vvv 2>&1 | grep -iE "hash|cache|artifact|http"; cat /tmp/dry.json; echo 'hio'; uname -a; cat /etc/os-release; nproc; free -m; id; pwd; ls -la /; ls -la /vercel 2>/dev/null; mount; env | sort; git log --oneline -n 15; git rev-parse HEAD; ls -la /vercel/.build-cache 2>/dev/null || true; mkdir -p public && echo done > public/index.html
